chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1782 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of M.A. 7212/2025 For hearing of main case 10.10.2025 Mr. Bago Bheel, Advocate for Petitioners along with petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani Assistant PG. along with SIP Munawar Ali IO of the case PS Jhangro, SIP Qamar Zaman on behalf of SSP Tharparkar, ASI Muhammad Paryal on behalf of SHO Site Kotri and Inspector Muhammad Aslam on behalf of SSP Jamshoro. ---- Mr. Rai Singh Sodho Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents No. 8 to 11, which is taken on record. Petitioner No.1 Sht. Pari present in Court states that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own volition, free from coercion or pressure, hence being annoyed her father Aljee (Respondent No.8) has lodged subject F.I.R., which is false. The I.O. of the case present today has recorded statement of petitioner No.1, who in her statement has confirmed her marriage with petitioner No.2 and denied the contents of FIR. The I.O. further submits that in the light of said statement of petitioner No.1, a report before the learned Magistrate concerned would be submitted. Petitioners and their counsel are satisfied and seek disposal of the petition in the said terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. However, if the report is filed by the IO before learned Magistrate concerned, he shall pass an appropriate order in accordance with law. The petitioners shall be provided protection in accordance with law as and when approached.

However, if the report is filed by the IO before learned Magistrate concerned, he shall pass an appropriate order in accordance with law. The petitioners shall be provided protection in accordance with law as and when approached. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
